blocks.text: Match preview: Rwanda Women face Malawi Women in 3rd Match (T20) on Thu, 11 Jun, 2026, 1:15 pm at Gahanga B Ground Kigali City. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.
Standard T20 surface expected. Conditions will be clearer at the toss — monitor team selection and dew factor for night games.
Expected par score: 160–180 runs par score.
Light drizzle · High 27°C / Low 16°C · Rain: 0.7 mm · Wind: up to 9 km/h. Light rain possible — overcast conditions could assist swing bowling early.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
